---
title: "Dyadic Data Analysis with R"
subtitle: "Part II: Applied Tutorial"
author:
  - "Pascal Küng"
  - "Turu Stadler"
resources:
  - uzh-logo.svg
  - charite-logo.svg
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    css: workshop.css
    include-after-body: branding.html
    footer: "Dyadic Data Analysis"
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: auto
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: source
---

## Applied tutorial

Content in development.
